title: Cuemath is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Cuemath is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Cuemath, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cuemath:
Cuemath is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cuemath!
